prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KIDSGOLFSET-2PK-KPKO Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kids 2pk Toy Golf Set With Golf Clubs, Plastic Balls, Practice Holes, and Rolling Caddy Playset Description: Enhance your little kid's imagination with this Happy Golfer Play Set. This golf caddy play set is perfect for your little ones when spending quality time with you or with their friends. It allows your kids to learn and have fun doing a pretend play with these golf tools and accessories. Fun toy-set that promotes interest about the functionality of tools when playing golf. Non-toxic toys that are safe to use and these are perfect add ons for kids workshop, pretend play, and party decorations.

Includes 2 red golf club holder that features wheel for easy transport, 6 golf balls, 3 types of clubs for each set, and 2 practice holes. This golf pretend play-set will promote development of child's hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills. Made of high quality materials that make this toy set strong and sturdy.

These can withstand with the bumps and crashes. Durable construction plastic toys that your kids will enjoy and creates a good time playing it outdoor or indoor. Recommended for ages 3 and above. Search Terms: toys toy golf kids golf kids sports child golf set Features: - GREAT PLAYTIME GAME FOR KIDS - This golf caddy play set is perfect for your little ones when spending quality time with you or with their friends. It allows your kids to learn and have fun doing a pretend play with these golf tools and accessories - GET READY FOR AN EDUCATIONAL FUN PLAY - Fun toy-set that promotes interest about the functionality of tools when playing golf. Non-toxic toys that are safe to use and these are perfect add ons for kids workshop, pretend play, and party decorations. Golf club holder has wheels for easy transportation - Each Set Comes with 3 Different Types of Golf Clubs (BOTH SETS RED COLOR) - Each Set Includes 3 Golf Balls & 2 Practice Holes - Promotes Development of Hand-eye Coordination & Fine Motor Skills === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 2-pk Kids Golf Set with Clubs, Balls & Caddy
